headline: Mastercard (MA) Faces Fresh EU Pressure As Digital Euro Plans Advance
summary: EU institutions are advancing plans for a central bank issued digital euro intended to give consumers and merchants a new public payments option across the bloc. Recent EU votes and policy discussions highlight an aim to reduce reliance on global payment networks dominated by non European providers such as Mastercard (NYSE:MA). The initiative signals that regulators are open to favoring European based payment solutions, which could affect Mastercard’s competitive footing in the region over...

headline: Mastercard vs. PayPal: Which Financial Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Mastercard posts high margins and growth, while PayPal trades at a steep discount.
